sourceMovie.title: Romeo + Juliet
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: Romeo + Juliet works as a drama movie with a point of view—fans quote moments, but they also argue about what the film is actually saying about power, desire, or survival. The drama and romance blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: A Walk to Remember
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Romeo + Juliet clicked for you, A Walk to Remember (2002) is a strong next stop: both trade in drama and romance, with emotional whiplash that feels honest. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after Romeo + Juliet?
faq.answer: Try A Walk to Remember, West Side Story, West Side Story—each shares DNA with Romeo + Juliet while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is Romeo + Juliet?
faq.answer: Romeo + Juliet (1996) is best described as Drama, Romance. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is Romeo + Juliet worth revisiting?
faq.answer: Viewer scores sit around 6.8/10 on TMDB—high enough that replays are common for people who like this drama lane.
